Chen Cong Èô≥ÁêÆ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Cong (Èô≥ÁêÆ)was born in Xiapi. Son of Chen Qiu, became an administrator under Cao Cao. Chen Cong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
